# This directory holds exported chunks JSONL files (Contract #1).
# Files are generated by the parse_pdf worker task.
#
# Layout: data/chunks/{workspace_id}/{paper_id}.jsonl
#
# This directory is gitignored (see root .gitignore) because chunks contain
# real paper content and should not be committed.
#
# The directory itself is kept in the repo so the path exists on fresh clones.
